_note: Track at FEATURE level. Sprint-level-only tracking is a schema violation. Every feature must have its own entry with status, evaluator verdicts, and coverage.

features.name: Log Buffer
features.notes: pkg/logbuffer: three-term mmap'd ring buffer, atomic appender, reader. Delivered in S1.

features.name: Ring Buffers and IPC
features.notes: pkg/ipc/ringbuffer (SPSC, MPSC), pkg/ipc/broadcast, pkg/ipc/memmap. Delivered in S1.

features.name: QUIC Transport Adapter
features.notes: pkg/transport/quic: Connection interface, Dial, Listen, TLS 1.3 enforced. Delivered in S2.

features.name: Multi-QUIC Connection Pool
features.notes: pkg/transport/pool: Pool struct with Add/Remove/Connections/Len. Delivered in S2.

features.name: Connection Arbitrator
features.notes: pkg/transport/arbitrator: LowestRTT, LeastOutstanding, Hybrid, Sticky, Random strategies. Delivered in S2.

features.name: Path Manager and Latency Probes
features.notes: pkg/driver/pathmgr: PING/PONG probes, EWMA RTT, atomic PoolSnapshot. Delivered in S4.

features.name: Adaptive Pool Learner
features.notes: pkg/driver/poolmgr: latency-loss correlation model, automatic pool size adjustment. Delivered in S5.

features.name: Driver Agents (Conductor/Sender/Receiver)
features.notes: pkg/driver/conductor, sender, receiver + cmd/hsd/main.go. Delivered in S3.

features.name: Pool Manager Agent
features.notes: pkg/driver/poolmgr: connection lifecycle, cert rotation via SPIRE. Delivered in S5.

features.name: Client Library
features.notes: pkg/client: Client, Publication, Subscription, Image. pkg/channel URI parser. Delivered in S6.

features.name: Congestion Control
features.notes: pkg/cc: CUBIC, BBR, BBRv3, DRL/ONNX stub. Delivered in S2/S7.

features.name: Observability
features.notes: pkg/counters, pkg/obs, cmd/hyperspace-stat. Delivered in S8.

features.name: AWS Integration
features.notes: pkg/discovery (Cloud Map), pkg/config (SSM), pkg/identity (Secrets Manager). Delivered in S9.

features.name: SPIFFE/SPIRE Identity
features.notes: pkg/identity: SPIFFEIdentity, FetchSVID, Watch. Delivered in S9.

_schema_rules: Every feature MUST have its own entry -- no sprint-level-only tracking
status may only be set to evaluator_pass when code_evaluator_verdict is PASS
coverage_pct must be populated when status moves to code_complete or later
pr_number should be set when a PR is opened for this feature
